title: Amy the Ambulance and the Sleepy Kitten
description: Amy gives a very sleepy kitten a calm ride home through a gentle evening shower.

Amy.role: Main character; a calm, kind neighborhood ambulance
Amy.color: Warm coral-red lower body with a creamy white upper body and pale teal trim
Amy.bodyShape: Compact rounded boxy ambulance with a short hood, softly curved corners, and no arms or hands
Amy.face: Large hazel windshield eyes with soft lashes and a small friendly smile in the front grille
Amy.wheels: Four dark charcoal tires with cream hubcaps and pale teal center dots
Amy.accessories: Small amber roof light bar, pale teal heart badge on each side, silver mirrors, and a folded lavender blanket visible inside

Miso.role: Supporting character; a small sleepy kitten
Miso.appearance: Tiny ginger kitten with a cream muzzle and chest, three darker forehead stripes, green eyes, and a sky-blue collar with a round gold tag

settingBible.Willow Lane: A cozy vehicle village with a small clinic, flower boxes, rounded cottages, a duck pond, willow trees, and warm lanterns
settingBible.visualStyle: Warm polished 3D children's illustration, soft rounded forms, clean single-scene compositions, gentle evening colors, and no readable text

continuityRules: Amy keeps the same coral-red, creamy white, and pale teal color blocking on every page.
Amy always has hazel windshield eyes, four matching wheels, amber roof lights, silver mirrors, and pale teal heart badges.
Amy and every vehicle have no human-like arms or hands.
Miso remains a tiny ginger kitten with a cream muzzle and chest, three forehead stripes, green eyes, and a sky-blue collar.
The lavender blanket appears only after Amy opens her rear door on Page 6 and stays with Miso through Page 14.
The sky progresses from golden evening to lavender dusk, light rain, clearing twilight, and moonlit night.
Every illustration is one continuous scene with no panels, collage, grid, contact sheet, text, badge, logo, or watermark.

pages.text: One warm evening, Amy the Ambulance finished her gentle check around Willow Lane. Her amber lights glowed softly.
pages.illustrationScene: Amy rolls away from the little clinic into Willow Lane at golden evening, with flower boxes and round cottages behind her.
pages.continuityNotes: Establish Amy's exact coral-red and creamy white color blocking, pale teal trim, hazel windshield eyes, four matching wheels, amber roof lights, and silver mirrors.

pages.text: Near the library garden, Amy heard a tiny yawn. A ginger kitten sat beneath a bench, blinking his sleepy green eyes.
pages.illustrationScene: Amy pauses beside a garden bench where Miso sits under hanging purple flowers, yawning in the mellow evening light.
pages.continuityNotes: Introduce Miso's ginger fur, cream muzzle and chest, three forehead stripes, green eyes, blue collar, and gold tag. No blanket yet.

pages.text: “I’m Miso,” the kitten murmured. “But I played too long, and now I’m too tired to walk home.”
pages.illustrationScene: Miso sits beside Amy's front wheel and looks toward a distant hill of cottages while Amy listens with a caring expression.
pages.continuityNotes: Keep their scale consistent: Miso is shorter than Amy's wheel. Amy remains parked with roof lights softly glowing.

pages.text: “I can help you get there safely,” said Amy. She checked the quiet road toward Miso’s little blue cottage.
pages.illustrationScene: Amy faces a curving lane toward a small blue cottage on a distant hill, while Miso points with his nose from beside the bench.
pages.continuityNotes: The destination is a small rounded blue cottage with a yellow door and crescent-shaped weathervane; repeat it on Pages 12-15.

pages.text: A cool breeze rustled the willow leaves. Plip, plip—two raindrops landed on Amy’s shiny hood.
pages.illustrationScene: A breeze bends willow branches over Amy and Miso as the first two raindrops bead on Amy's hood and the sky turns lavender.
pages.continuityNotes: Begin the gentle weather transition. Miso remains outside without the blanket; Amy's surfaces are only lightly damp.

pages.text: Amy opened her rear door and lowered the little ramp. Inside waited a soft lavender blanket.
pages.illustrationScene: Amy is shown in a rear three-quarter view with one rear door open and a short ramp lowered, revealing a neatly folded lavender blanket inside.
pages.continuityNotes: Amy still has no arms or hands. Show the same body colors and wheels from a new angle; introduce the lavender blanket.

pages.text: Miso padded up the ramp and curled onto the blanket. “This feels cozy,” he purred.
pages.illustrationScene: Miso walks up Amy's lowered ramp toward the lavender blanket, with his tail curved happily and light rain sparkling around them.
pages.continuityNotes: Keep Miso's collar and markings visible. The blanket stays inside Amy and remains lavender.

pages.text: Amy rolled slowly along the lantern path. The gentle rain made tiny silver circles in the puddles.
pages.illustrationScene: Amy drives along a lantern-lined lane with Miso visible through a side window, while small round puddles ripple in gentle rain.
pages.continuityNotes: Amy's amber lights are soft, not flashing brightly. Miso is wrapped loosely in the lavender blanket inside.

pages.text: At the duck pond, a fallen branch blocked the lane. Amy stopped with plenty of room to spare.
pages.illustrationScene: Amy stops safely before a leafy branch lying across the narrow pond lane, with ducks sheltered under reeds and Miso watching through the window.
pages.continuityNotes: Show a small leafy branch, not danger or damage. Amy and Miso keep their exact established appearance.

pages.text: Amy spotted a smooth path around the pond. “We can take the quiet way,” she said.
pages.illustrationScene: From the stopped position, Amy looks toward a safe curved path of pale stones around the pond as the rain begins to ease.
pages.continuityNotes: The blocked lane stays behind Amy; the alternate path is clearly separate, safe, broad, and single-scene.

pages.text: Around the pond they went, past sleepy ducks and shining reeds. Miso’s purr became a soft little rumble.
pages.illustrationScene: Amy follows the pale stone path beside the pond, passing drowsy ducks and wet reeds under a clearing violet sky.
pages.continuityNotes: Miso remains visible inside with the lavender blanket; use the same pond and path geography introduced on Pages 9-10.

pages.text: Soon the little blue cottage appeared beyond the willow trees. Its yellow porch light shone like a star.
pages.illustrationScene: Amy emerges from the willow-lined path and approaches Miso's rounded blue cottage with yellow door, crescent weathervane, and glowing porch light.
pages.continuityNotes: Match the destination established on Page 4. The rain has stopped, and droplets still glimmer on Amy.

pages.text: Miso’s mama hurried onto the porch. “You brought my sleepy kitten home,” she said with a grateful smile.
pages.illustrationScene: A slightly larger ginger mother cat with a cream chest waits on the cottage porch as Amy lowers her ramp and Miso looks up sleepily.
pages.continuityNotes: Miso's mama resembles Miso but has no collar and only two forehead stripes. Amy's ramp and lavender blanket match Pages 6-7.

pages.text: Miso carried the lavender blanket to his basket by the window. “Thank you for the cozy ride, Amy.”
pages.illustrationScene: Through the open cottage doorway, Miso settles with the lavender blanket in a round basket by the window while Amy smiles from the porch path.
pages.continuityNotes: The same lavender blanket moves with Miso into the cottage. Amy remains outside; her rear door is now closed.

pages.text: That night, Amy rested beneath the quiet moon. In the blue cottage, Miso dreamed warm and snug. Goodnight, Amy, and goodnight, Miso.
pages.illustrationScene: Amy rests on the lane beneath a crescent moon while the blue cottage glows softly and sleeping Miso is visible in his window basket.
pages.continuityNotes: Bedtime ending: Amy keeps all locked features, Miso sleeps with the lavender blanket, and the cottage matches Pages 4 and 12-14.
